english: Resembling collyrium in hue, son of the Sun, elder brother of Yama
Born of Chhaya and the Sun — I bow to Saturn
roman: Chhaya Martanda sambhutam tam namami Shanaishcharam

hindi: कोणस्थः पिङ्गलो बभ्रुः कृष्णो रौद्रोऽन्तको यमः।
english: He who stands in the corner, Pingala, dark-red, black, fierce, the Ender, Yama
roman: Konasthah Pingalo Babhruh Krishno Raudro antako Yamah

english: Souri, Shanishchara, the slow one — praised by Pippalada

hindi: एतानि दश नामानि प्रातरुत्थाय यः पठेत्।
english: Whoever reads these ten names upon rising in the morning
roman: Etani dasha namani pratar utthaya yah pathet

hindi: शनैश्चरकृता पीडा न भवेत् तस्य सर्वदा॥
english: Shall never be tormented by Saturn at any time
roman: Shanaishchara krita pida na bhavet tasya sarvada

english: Whoever reads this Shani Stotram composed by Dasharatha daily
roman: Dasharatha kritam Shani stotram yah pathet nityam

english: Is freed from Shani dosha and always attains happiness
roman: Shani doshat vimuchyate sukham apnoti sarvada
